title: Hard-negative-mining ablation decision artifact
description: OUTPUT-ONLY schema for the final runs/_hard_negative_decision.json artifact (plan docs/planning/additional_components_plan.md §4.7). Sister-file precedent: components/copy_paste_balance/gates/_copy_paste_decision_schema.json (locked iter-11 2026-05-09). 2-arm cascade (no_hn baseline vs with_hn candidate); MetricsBlock split into BaselineMetricsBlock (is_baseline_reference=true + all-zero deltas + map_no_regression=true) and CandidateMetricsBlock (is_baseline_reference=false). headline_arm enum is single-value 'with_hn' since the baseline arm carries no decision. Validation library: jsonschema (Draft-7).

fp_manifest_sha256.description: SHA256 of the §4.7 frozen FP eval manifest (shared with §3.7). Runner enforces equality across this top-level field, every metrics block's fp_manifest_sha256, and the manifest file's actual hash.

headline_arm.description: 'no_hn' is REJECTED at the schema boundary because the baseline reference cell carries no decision. The runtime layer rejects 'no_hn' at the runner-config boundary; mirror that contract here. The single-element enum captures that with_hn is the only legal headline (this differs from §3.7's two-element enum because §四 has only one candidate arm).

no_hn.description: Baseline reference; no decision is computed (the rule is undefined on a self-comparison). All MetricsBlock delta fields are constrained to exactly 0 by BaselineMetricsBlock.

allOf.description: Codex stop-gate fix 2026-05-10: encode decision-vs-verdict consistency at the schema layer for DEPLOY ONLY. Plan §4.7 requires total mAP no-regression as a deploy guard but NOT as a defer guard (defer is gated solely on fp_drop in [20%, 50%) AND recall_delta ≥ −0.5 pp; a defer cell with mAP regression is plan-legal). The earlier iter-1 if/then covered both deploy and defer — that mistakenly extended a §3.7 sister constraint into §四 where the plan prose excludes it.
Codex stop-gate fix 2026-05-10: same decision-vs-verdict consistency at the top-level headline — DEPLOY ONLY (defer is plan-legal with mAP regression).

fp_drop_frac.description: Signed fraction; +0.5 = 50% reduction; negative = FP rose. The math admits any value in (-inf, 1]; the [-10, 1] range is a TRIPWIRE for catastrophic candidates (FP rose by > 10x relative to baseline). Mirror at the dataclass layer (ArmMetrics._FP_DROP_FRAC_MIN). 1.0 is the absolute ceiling = 100% drop.

map_no_regression.description: Upstream eval verdict for THIS arm vs baseline. Per-cell so the artifact carries the verdict that drove the decision. For BaselineMetricsBlock this is constrained to const true (self-comparison).

map_regression_tolerance_pp.description: Tolerance applied when computing map_no_regression. Cap at 0.5 mirrors §3.7/§4.7 drop threshold for total mAP regression — beyond that the deploy guard tolerates regressions the catch-all rejects.

data_yaml_sha256.description: Source data.yaml hash. Class-label provenance — runner enforces equality between top-level data_yaml_sha256, the no_hn block's hash, and the with_hn block's hash.

BaselineMetricsBlock.description: no_hn arm's metrics block. is_baseline_reference is fixed true; every delta field is fixed 0 (the baseline is constructed by self-comparison; non-zero deltas indicate a runner construction bug). map_no_regression is fixed true (the baseline self-comparison has no regression possible).

CandidateMetricsBlock.description: with_hn arm's metrics block. is_baseline_reference is fixed false so a candidate cell can't silently masquerade as baseline.
